summary: The diff modifies backend/main.mo (truncated, but presumably adds description field to searchHomepageProducts) and frontend/src/components/public/product/ProductDetailsModal.tsx. The frontend modal change sets description = productData.description for the HomepageSearchResult branch, which enables the modal to display the description when opened from search results. The backend change is truncated but the project_state.json and frontend changes strongly suggest the description field was added to the backend response. Most REQ-1 acceptance criteria appear to be addressed.

hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states 'Do not modify any frontend components' and 'Modifications to the product details modal component' is listed as a non-goal. However, ProductDetailsModal.tsx was modified in the diff to handle the description field from HomepageSearchResult.
